title: geonoma pinnatifrons subsp. oxycarpa
intro: Geonoma pinnatifrons subsp. oxycarpa is a subspecies of palm tree, scientifically known as a species of Geonoma, a genus of palms native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its traditional uses in folk medicine. The health benefits of Geonoma pinnatifrons subsp. oxycarpa include relief from fever, cold, and cough, as well as its potential in treating digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to create remedies for various ailments.
